title: You need a work permit – Francophone Mobility - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit – Francophone Mobility
If you’re a French-speaking or bilingual worker who plans to live and work outside Quebec, you need a work permit.
Based on your answer, you may be eligible for an employer-specific work permit (opens in a new tab) . You don’t need a labour market impact assessment (LMIA) .
Find out if you’re eligible

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
